item.title: A maintenance technician exposes how plastic waste gets in pig feed
item.description:
It's all feed, all the way down.
D: edit- an article about it - take from it what you will, but important to provide further info https://www.fayobserver.com/story/news/2022/05/05/nc-pig-feed-plastics-claim-went-tiktok-viral-does-public-have-worry/6984395001/

item.title: Do we worship this kid now or wait until he realizes his powers?
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: On to newer and better things...
item.description: I know this post is attention grabby.. and do i think some of you will care? Not really... but i did want to make a point about the difference of chasing money and chasing a passion. I've managed to transition my nerdy loves into a hobby more worthwhile and soul healing. Plus the difference in communities... I wont cast stones, but the glass community is so loving and helpful. Anyways heres some samples of my finished pieces!!! Tl;dr I had a bad experience in cosplay and started stained glass. And i'm much happier.
item.dc:creator: Kayjora

item.title: Religious persecution
item.description: "The religious persecution of the ages has been carried on under what was claimed to be the command of God. I distrust those people who know so well what God wants them to do, because I notice it always coincides with their own desires" – The History of Woman Suffrage (1902) Volume IV; XVI; page 263 https://www.gutenberg.org/cache/epub/29870/pg29870-images.html Anthony (1820-1906) was a US abolitionist and important women's suffrage activist
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Commissions!
item.description: *UPDATE* Thanks guys for the amazing support! And to all of those who love my art and can’t afford to support me I still really appreciate the love of what I do and what I post. Thanks so much and much love to you all! https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella/commissions Little bit of shameless promo for my commissions! But the end of this month has been a little tight for me. I'm paying a lot in rent atm due to ending my last relationship and taking on a majority of payments, so I could use a bit of extra cash to save for another deposit! Thanks so much!

item.title: Meme Dump 25 out of 200
item.description:
Hii imgur ~ thanks for joining me in another phone cleaning out meme dump
I'm gonna ramble pointlessly throughout the descriptions
Like seriously absolutely pointless
No need to read
Just look at the memes and have a little giggle
Today was a cold cold day where I live
Of course for the past few weeks it's been warm so I turned the temperature down
And I did that thing where you're laying in bed
Freezing
And instead of getting up to grab another blanket
Or turning up the heat
Or grabbing fuzzy socks to stay warm
You just lay there and suffer
Shivering
Hoping that maybe the sleep paralyzes demon
Will turn up the heat for you
I did that today
But just vibing
So all day
I'd do a little work
Complain to myself about freezing
And not do anything about it
Go rest on the couch
Freezing
Complain but of course not turn up the heat
Or put on warmer clothes
Just suffering (:
Why am i like this?
Bet you anything I'll do the same tomorrow
Because it's supposed to be cold too
Anyway that's my cold day rambling story
Anyone go on maniac cleaning sprees where you wash
Everything
Even the walls?
Did that last week when it was warm
Everything is spotless ♡
Expect my life
*finger guns*
Alright idk what else to ramble about soooo see you at the end ♡
Thanks for joining me on another phone cleaning dumparoo adventure ~ happy Wednesday my dudes #memes #funny #memedump
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Whispering sweet bottom shelf memes into your ear.
item.description:
I do too. How is everyone else saying? It's one of those words that stops being a word after a while
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
https://youtu.be/J5TgAJHkY4k?si=J-y5_pN5oT7K2-NG Here's a fun minute and 30 second clip for ya.
Damn. It's much more elegant than mine.
Now, a look into the shopping algorithm of a bottom shelf meme distributor.
My algorithm has zero idea what to try to sell me.
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka @TheMadOnion @CloacaDeepInADragon @humlyhums @FrothyStout
@SleepyheadNPC
Taxi Bear tax.

item.title: I am doing IVF in the USA and it is a rollercoaster, story time for those who want to learn more
item.description:
There is inevitable and heartbreaking loss at almost every stage of IVF treatments (retrieving eggs) and implantation procedures (putting embryos in the womb) but some people have no other way to get pregnant. When harvesting eggs only some will be mature no matter how many drugs you take. Numbers of success have gone up as the science has improved so about 80% of mature eggs survive fertilization, but now we are dealing with embryos technically and this is where things get complicated. Only about 40-50% of embryos make it to days 5-7 or what is called the blastocyst phase or the “blast phase.” This is unbelievably hard for people who have worked so hard to get this far and now doctors/nurses could become criminals bc they CANNOT change this. We do not want to lose these embryos, they are our chances at having our deeply wanted babies but this is part of a natural process that weeds out non-viable pregnancies and this happens in the womb as well, women typically produce more than one egg and but usually only one or two eggs mature to make it to natural ovulation during a normal pregnancy. The medications we take for IVF can help people produce more eggs but more often they are just helping mature more of the eggs you already produce every month, especially as you get older. We want quality over quantity but both help. The ruling in Alabama has shut down clinics already bc they cannot avoid embryo death, it happens in pretty much every IVF cycle ever done, and if there was a way to stop this we would but this will likely always be the case even as the science improves bc it is a natural part of procreating. We want healthy pregnancies for parents who WANT to have kids, not forced birth for unprepared parents… I am in my late 30s and I have fallopian tube issues causing me to have two fallopian ectopic implantations that were not able to be saved bc once an embryo has implanted outside of the womb it is not viable no matter how much you want that baby. I have to have two different emergency surgeries to have one and then the other of my tubes removed so I didn’t bleed to death or die of infection, whatever comes first. My first IVF cycle retrieval (yesterday) yielded only 3 mature eggs and now they have to go through the fertilization process were I may lose half, I am hoping for two embryos to make it to the blast stage but that is against the odds. If there was ANYTHING me or my doctors could do to improve my chances we would, trust me! I know adoption is a good option but that is not what we are talking about here, that will be my only option if IVF fails for me bc I do not plan to use donor eggs or embryos, that is a personal choice. In the state of Colorado, since I am diagnosed with infertility, I get three IVF rounds and unlimited embryo implantations covered by my insurance and I will give it my best shot, everyone suffering from infertility, regardless of gender, deserves this chance to not only try IVF but to have their insurance cover it bc it is a treatable disorder that is becoming increasingly common due to environmental factors and how many people are waiting to start families until they are more stable in life. I also had a spine injury requiring surgery that set me back in starting this process.
If any fertilized eggs make it to the blast phase then we get to implant. Implantation is tricky and the numbers can be slightly higher for success here but there is still loss, not all of them make it, maybe close to half or a bit more. These embryos also may die in the womb which is why when IVF was starting out they used to implant a bunch and see what stuck (see octomom and the many IVF patients with twins). Freezing embryos is also needed since we are not implanting them all at the same time anymore and these freezing methods have greatly improved over time, but there can be heartbreaking loss here too. Since I have a spine injury, I am a tiny person, and “of an advanced maternal age,” multiple births is risky and we will be implanting one at a time (if I get any viable blast phase embryos) with waiting being the hardest part. I want a baby so bad, I have been though a lot to get here and it already looks like I will be gearing up for another round of IVF due to low numbers. We will change up the medications and hope for a better result. Other people’s religious believes have no place in my process with my doctors around IVF. If YOU don’t believe in IVF or other pregnancy interventions such as abortion, then you don’t have to participate and I do not need to be told what to do with my body, or have embryos defined by non-medical religious cunts who daily contradict themselves in their mission to control others especially women and LGBTQAI+ ppl. I want to be a mom so bad, I want to be pregnant and let my body go through this process, and yes I want a baby with my goofy genes. I am prepared and if I ever want a 2nd kid I will adopt bc of how difficult this process is for me and I can’t really hope for two babies, one is good enough.
I have been injecting medications morning and night for the past two two weeks with appointments across the city every other day or every day at the end. I am bruised from the injections and all the blood tests, I am bloated and tired. But I will fight for other people to not only have to chance to do this but to also someday have it covered by their insurance, this is the way. If someone if strong enough to get through this process and they get lucky enough to make it to a healthy birth, why not let them? What not make it more accessible rather than less? WHO CARES what you ancient books say? This did not exist in ancient times, and if infertility is god’s will then so is every other treatable condition and that is insane. We do not have to suffer and die, our medical system here in America is already messed up and that is an understatement. With monthly payments included, I spend around 10,000$ on healthcare a year and that is considered a low cost for IVF so I am lucky! People die and suffer from treatable diseases every year and that needs to end. I am ready to fight and hopefully I get to do that with my own kid at my side to show them how we can make the world a better, safer, happier place for them in the future. Universal healthcare and body autonomy now! This is just the start of what we need to change in this country…
We are going to need more people to get back on the same page and start working together to vote politicians out who seek to control others especially under the guise of religion, we need to enforce separation of church and state now. We need to reform the already problematic policies around healthcare so this doesn’t continue to be the modern dark ages of the USA where the working class suffers and even dies due to the rich taking more than their fair share, getting all the opportunities and luxuries, and finding every tax loophole that shouldn’t exist. We need all politicians to stop taking money from corporations who care only about quarterly profits are returns for shareholders bc we live in a finite world where infinite growth is not even possible. We need to stop allowing lobbying aimed to make us more sick, broke, desperate, and divided. Please vote but also speak up, share your stories bc we need more ppl to understand the hardships we are all facing. Thank you for reading
Beanie baby tax bc I am an elder millennial
item.dc:creator: Me1iss0

item.title: Two birds, one stone
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Oof, don’t talk ill of the show I guess.
item.description: I just wanted em to notice so they’d maybe fix it at some point in the next 9-11 weeks. Other than that it seems like a pretty good show. Edit: ok apparently it was because I said “ass” in the title, which, y’know, I just watched a guy [spoilers] get boiled alive in episode one, but easy on the naughty words in the sub you guys. EDIT edit: Ok so I owe Disney an apology, sorta, this is *Microsoft’s* fault. Those are Xbox subtitles, which can be improved a little in the system options, but for some reason always look terrible, and do this thing with the black box, and display in the wrong resolution… it’s a real shit show. Now Disney doesn’t *have* to use them… like, Netflix figured that shit out, but they’re off the hook for them looking like this.
item.dc:creator: TheGhostofElizabethShue

item.title: HH
item.description: Since my partner passed away, our dogs have honestly kept me alive. They’ve woken me up, made me go outside for a walk, and (after a few months) made me laugh. We’re extraordinarily privileged to have this relationship with another species.

item.title: Hey Everyone !! Wanted to show one of my acrylic paintings. I was really testing myself with this one.
item.description: Hey everyone, your ol' pal Flooko here again. An old fav painting of mine that Im proud of. Its definitely a play on Escher , I wanted to bring it into the modern area.. and with paint this time! For those interested, my site with all my other paintings is http://www.flookart.com thanks everyone ! #art #painting #creativity #mildly_interesting #space
